title: schizoloma scoparium
intro: Schizoloma scoparium, also known as the Scotch moss or Scotch moss fern, is a type of terrestrial fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Schizoloma scoparium include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it useful in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Schizoloma scoparium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote skin health and soothe irritations.
